displayTitle: Every ET Test Answers to a Document

beats.narration: Eddy current runs on documents as much as coils. Before the probe energizes, know which paper governs the job — and what authority it carries.

payload.title: ANSWERS TO PAPER
payload.sub: Which document governs, and how much weight it carries.

beats.narration: Four tiers cover it. A code carries legal force, a standard supplies the method, a spec binds it to contract, the procedure works the bench.
ASTM organizes by what you examine. Read scope first — titanium tube isn't in the copper practice, so nothing past section one even applies.

payload.heading: Map the ASTM family, scope first

tiles.s: E243 copper · E309 steel · E426 Ti

beats.narration: Here's the trap. ASTM and ASME Section Five tell you how to examine. Accept-or-reject lives upstream — the product spec, code section, or purchase order.
So confirm procedure revision, reference standard, and parameters against the contract. Know the order of precedence — because the bench never picks a winner.

payload.sub: Conflicts get resolved in writing, never at the bench.
